name: Yoghurt Jar
desc: Full fat yoghurt + frozen blueberries + ground flaxseed + walnuts + optional honey. Make the night before in a jar — grab from fridge on the way out.
ingredients: Full fat natural yoghurt|Frozen blueberries|Ground flaxseed|Walnuts|Honey

name: Nut Butter & Banana Oatcakes
desc: Nairn's oatcakes + Brain Food nut butter + sliced banana. Pack in a container, eat at your desk.

name: Smoked Salmon Oatcakes
desc: Nairn's oatcakes + smoked salmon + squeeze of lemon. Two minutes, high protein.

name: Scrambled Eggs & Mushrooms
desc: Eggs scrambled with garlic-fried mushrooms + spinach wilted in at the end. Great for a slower morning.

name: Boiled Eggs & Avocado
desc: Two boiled eggs + sliced avocado + cherry tomatoes + olive oil drizzle.

name: Smoked Salmon & Avocado Rye
desc: Rye bread + smoked salmon + sliced avocado + lemon. With olives on the side + apple.

name: Lentil & Beetroot Salad
desc: Cold lentil pouch + sliced beetroot + olive oil + lemon. With rye crackers + apple.
ingredients: Precooked lentil pouch|Cooked beetroot|Olive oil|Lemon|Rye crackers|Apple

name: Houmous & Crudités
desc: Houmous + celery, carrot and cucumber sticks to dip. With rye crackers + apple.

name: Beetroot & Walnut
desc: Sliced beetroot + walnuts + olive oil + lemon. With rye crackers + apple.

name: Smoked Salmon & Rye with Sauerkraut
desc: Rye bread + smoked salmon + pot of sauerkraut on the side + cherry tomatoes + apple.

name: Lentil & Artichoke
desc: Cold lentil pouch + artichoke hearts + olive oil + lemon + black pepper. With rye crackers + apple.
ingredients: Precooked lentil pouch|Jarred artichoke hearts|Olive oil|Lemon|Rye crackers|Apple

name: Coconut Lentil Soup
desc: Precooked lentils + coconut milk + turmeric + ginger + stock. Sprinkle flaxseed on top. 10 mins.
ingredients: Precooked lentil pouch|Tinned coconut milk|Turmeric|Ginger|Good stock|Ground flaxseed|Black pepper

name: Salmon with Lentils
desc: Pan-fried salmon fillet + warmed lentil pouch + lemon + garlic + olive oil. 15 mins.
ingredients: Fresh salmon fillet|Precooked lentil pouch|Garlic|Lemon|Olive oil

name: Chickpea & Tomato Stew
desc: Tinned chickpeas + tinned tomatoes + garlic + cumin + turmeric + black pepper. Serve with rye bread. 10 mins.

name: Black Beans with Caramelised Onions & Miso
desc: Slow-fried onions until golden + black beans + cumin + miso stirred in at the end. Serve with rye bread. 15 mins.
ingredients: Tinned black beans|Onions|Cumin|Miso paste|Olive oil|Rye bread

name: Tofu Noodle Miso Bowl
desc: Soba noodles + cubed tofu + miso broth + mushrooms + spinach or pak choi. Sprinkle flaxseed. 12 mins.
ingredients: Soba noodles|Firm tofu|Miso paste|Mushrooms|Spinach|Good stock|Ground flaxseed

name: Pasta with Cherry Tomatoes & Garlic
desc: Wholegrain pasta + olive oil + garlic + cherry tomatoes + spinach wilted in at the end. 15 mins.

name: Eggs & Artichokes
desc: Fried eggs in olive oil + jarred artichoke hearts + black pepper. 5 mins.

name: Flageolet Beans & Asparagus
desc: Flageolet beans + asparagus + garlic + olive oil + lemon. Light and fresh. 10 mins.

name: Butter Bean & Spinach
desc: Tinned butter beans + garlic + olive oil + lemon + spinach wilted in + black pepper. 10 mins.

name: Tinned Salmon & Beetroot Bowl
desc: Tinned salmon + sliced beetroot + lentils + olive oil + lemon + black pepper. Serve with rye bread. 10 mins.
ingredients: Tinned salmon|Cooked beetroot|Precooked lentil pouch|Olive oil|Lemon|Black pepper|Rye bread

name: Crispy Tofu with Sauerkraut
desc: Firm tofu sliced and pan-fried until golden + sauerkraut on the side + wholegrain mustard + rye bread. 15 mins.

name: Dark Chocolate & Peppermint Tea
desc: 2 squares 85% dark chocolate + peppermint tea. Make it a proper end-of-day ritual.

name: Yoghurt Bowl
desc: Full fat yoghurt + frozen blueberries + honey drizzle. Light and satisfying.

name: Coconut Collaborative Pot
desc: Dark chocolate coconut yoghurt pot. A good Friday treat.

name: Stewed Fruit with Cinnamon
desc: Apple or pear + cinnamon on the hob for 5 mins. Warm and comforting. Top with yoghurt if you like.
